name: Planoraa

findings.title: Console errors detected
findings.fix_prompt: Investigate and fix the server response error for the missing resource.

findings.title: Failed network requests
findings.fix_prompt: Check and fix the image URLs or replace them with valid ones.

findings.title: Duplicate buttons
findings.fix_prompt: Remove or consolidate duplicate buttons to improve user experience.

findings.title: Missing alt text for images
findings.fix_prompt: Add alt text to all images on the page.

summary: The website has some minor issues with performance and content, but overall it looks professional and functions well. Fixing these issues can improve user experience and accessibility.

name: REOR Consulting

findings.title: Failed network requests
findings.fix_prompt: Investigate and fix the failed network requests by checking the URLs and ensuring the images are properly hosted and accessible.

findings.title: Missing alt text for images
findings.fix_prompt: Add alt text to all images on the page to improve accessibility and SEO.

findings.title: Inconsistent spacing
findings.fix_prompt: Review and adjust the spacing between elements to ensure a consistent design.

summary: The website has some minor issues with failed network requests, missing alt text, and inconsistent spacing, but overall it appears to be functional and visually appealing.
